name: Katted24 OÜ
c_heroLede: We make tarpaulins, load covers and partition curtains to order — built to your exact dimensions.
c_valuePropTitles: The widest range of PVC fabrics in Estonia
c_valuePropBodies: A wide range of colours and materials in one place — we'll find the right fit.
We can confidently say our covers are made the fastest.
From private clients to large companies — every cover built to your need.
Tell us what you need and we'll propose a solution you won't find elsewhere.
We build and maintain cover systems — from project to repair.
c_useCasesHeading: Where can PVC fabric covers be used?
c_useCasesIntro: Almost anything can be made from PVC fabric. Below is a small part of what we've built.
c_solutionsIntro: We work daily with hauliers, builders, farmers, boat owners and homeowners. Pick a category to read more.
c_solutionBodies: Covers for sandboxes, grills, smokers, garden furniture, pools, barrel saunas and other backyard gear. Air- and watertight solutions, built to your dimensions.

We repair anything made of PVC fabric: trailer covers, trampolines, floating tubes, dinghies, party-tent repairs and entertainment structures (rally arches, start-finish arches, inflatable attractions). Plus trailer-cover repairs, PVC patching, zippers, straps, fastenings and worn-edge reinforcement.
Tarpaulins for truck trailers and load covers for construction debris, lumber and logs. Side and roof solutions, hatches, reinforced seams, eyelet/strap/hook fastenings and optional printed logos.
PVC partition curtains, carports, container covers, shed covers and more. Movable curtains on rails, transparent strips and enclosed solutions for warehouses, workshops and car-washes.

We don't build or install PVC halls (yet!), but all aftercare and repair is our work: hall-cover replacement, leak repair and storm-damage repair. A hall cover lasts 15–20 years. It must be re-tensioned 4× a year and always after a major storm; do an annual visual inspection — check cover tension, cables, bolts, ground anchors and fittings. We can add air vents for better circulation. In windy weather keep doors closed — an open door raises internal pressure and can tear the roof. Physical damage must always be repaired immediately — later it costs many times more. For large halls we travel across Estonia, including the islands.
Bottom and underlay covers, grain socks, slurry-tank covers and other solutions for farming and forestry.
PVC-fabric tubes, bellows and ducts for industrial use — custom-made to your dimensions.
Camo covers for military vehicles and structures, and other special-purpose covers for the defence industry.

Transport and storage covers for hobby vehicles (snowmobiles, lawn tractors, motorcycles), underlay mats for motorsport (e.g. rally pit floors so oil and fluids don't reach the ground). PVC curtains and covers: plain, mesh, film and welding curtains. Plus private-client covers for sandboxes, grills, garden furniture, pools and barrel saunas.
Advertising banners and large-format prints on PVC fabric — durable and weatherproof.
We also sell PVC fabric by the metre — ask for the right material and quantity.
We train drivers in the correct use and care of covers. (Content to be confirmed with the client.)
Solutions for technical and facility managers — maintenance contracts and periodic inspection. (Brief to be confirmed with the client.)
c_aboutBody:
Katted24 OÜ is a family-owned Estonian company manufacturing, selling and repairing PVC-fabric products since 2010. Our workshop is in Tallinn at Gaasi 7.

Our main products are tarpaulins for truck trailers, various load covers and partition curtains. In addition we make PVC-fabric covers for light trailers, watercraft, barrel saunas and pools, plus garden-house, grill and sandbox covers for home yards.
c_valueBodies: We can confidently say our covers are made the fastest.
Quality craftsmanship and durable materials that last for years.
Honest pricing and clear communication — material, labour and delivery shown separately.
The widest colour range in Estonia and the readiness to solve even the most unusual request.
c_inspirationHeading: See what PVC fabric can do
c_inspirationIntro: A wide selection of examples of PVC covers in use — for inspiration and ideas.
c_faqIntro: The most common questions about pricing, ordering and production.
c_faqQuestions: Do you offer delivery and installation?
c_faqAnswers: Price depends on dimensions, material and fittings. We send a detailed quote with material, labour and delivery shown separately. (Exact pricing logic to be confirmed with the client.)
Send us your dimensions and a photo or drawing and we'll send you a quote. (Ordering process to be confirmed with the client.)
It depends on the product and volume — we give an exact timeline with the quote. We can speed up urgent orders where possible.
Yes — we pick up and deliver across Estonia, including the islands. We can install on site and show you how to use it.
We use durable PVC fabric (up to 900 g/m²), UV-stable materials and stainless fittings.
c_formTitle: Send your dimensions, get an exact quote
c_formLede: Fill in the form — we'll email you a quote. Quotes are free and come with no obligation.
c_formBulletBodies: we break down material, labour and delivery separately
every cover is built to your dimensions and colour preference
durable materials and strong seams — we'll repair if needed
30% deposit, the rest on delivery — cash or invoice
c_formProductTypeLabel: What would you like to order?
c_formFieldPlaceholders: e.g. previous cover torn on the right edge, need hatches on both sides…
c_formFootHelp: By pressing **Send request** you agree that we may contact you to discuss your quote. We never share your details with third parties.
c_formSuccessTitle: Your quote is on its way
c_formSuccessBody: We'll review your request and send a detailed quote as soon as we can.
c_formSuccessRowBodies: we'll call if we need clarifications
and you're not committed to anything
c_formSuccessCardBody: We'll review the details and send a quote as soon as we can.
c_teamIntro: A small, dedicated crew that builds every cover to your dimensions.
c_careersBody: We always welcome people who want to learn PVC-cover making. Send your CV to info@katted24.ee.
c_contactIntro: The fastest way to reach us is the quote form. The workshop is open Mon–Fri — call ahead if you're stopping by.
c_contactCallLabel: Fill in the form — we'll reply as soon as we can
c_footerTagline: PVC covers, tarpaulins and load covers. Made in Estonia, built to order, delivered nationwide.
c_metaDescription: Katted24 OÜ makes custom PVC covers — tarpaulins, load covers, partition curtains, boat and sauna covers, plus PVC-hall maintenance. Request a quote.
c_privacyPolicyContent: The data controller is Katted24 OÜ (Gaasi 7, Tallinn 11415). We collect only the data you submit in the quote form (name, phone, email, product description) in order to prepare your quote. Data is not shared with third parties or used for marketing profiling. You have the right to access, correct and erase your data — write to info@katted24.ee. The supervisory authority is the Estonian Data Protection Inspectorate (info@aki.ee).
c_cookiesContent: This site uses only necessary cookies and — with your consent — Yext first-party analytics (pageviews, clicks, session ID, coarse location). Analytics do not run before consent. Data is retained ~13 months. You can change your choice any time via the footer link 'Cookie settings'.
c_cookieBody: We use necessary cookies and, with your consent, analytics to improve the site. No tracking happens before you accept.
